UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the CapFinder application, distinguishing between investors, startups, and admins.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the user or a representative of the company.

email.description: The primary contact email for the user. Used for communication.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile photo stored in Firebase Storage.

bio.description: A short biography or a brief description of the user's company or background.

company.description: The name of the company the user is associated with (e.g., startup name, investment firm name).

role.description: The role of the user, indicating whether they are an 'Investor', 'Startup', or 'Admin'.

investmentInterest.description: A description of the industries, stages, or types of startups an investor is interested in. (Relevant for 'Investor' role).

fundingNeeded.description: The total amount of funding the startup is currently seeking, in a numerical format. (Relevant for 'Startup' role).

lastActive.description: The last time the user was active on the platform.

disabled.description: Whether the user account is disabled by an admin.

verified.description: Whether the user's identity has been verified by platform administrators.

StartupPitch.title: StartupPitch
StartupPitch.description: Represents an investment pitch posted by a startup, visible to investors.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StartupPitch entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity of the startup that posted this pitch.

startupName.description: The official name of the startup presenting this pitch.

description.description: A detailed description of the startup, its product/service, market, and business model.

fundingNeeded.description: The specific amount of funding requested for this particular pitch.

category.description: The standardized category of the startup (e.g., AI, Fintech, SaaS).

contactEmail.description: An email address for potential investors to contact the startup directly regarding this pitch.

imageURL.description: URL to the venture's primary pitch image hosted on Cloudinary.

postedDate.description: The date and time when the pitch was posted.

Interest.title: Interest
Interest.description: Represents an investor expressing interest in a startup's pitch.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Interest entity.

pitchId.description: The ID of the pitch the investor is interested in.

investorEmail.description: The email of the investor expressing interest.

startupOwnerId.description: The UID of the startup owner who posted the pitch.

startupName.description: The name of the startup (denormalized for UI).

industry.description: The industry/category of the startup (denormalized for UI).

Favorite.title: Favorite
Favorite.description: Represents a startup pitch saved by an investor for later review.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Favorite entity.

investorId.description: The UID of the investor who saved the pitch.

pitchId.description: The ID of the pitch that was saved.

startupName.description: Denormalized name of the startup for display.

ContactRequest.title: ContactRequest
ContactRequest.description: Represents a request for contact info/messaging between investor and startup.

senderId.description: UID of the investor sending the request.

receiverId.description: UID of the startup owner receiving the request.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A private message between an investor and a startup for a specific pitch.

read.description: Whether the message has been read by the receiver.

DeleteRequest.title: DeleteRequest
DeleteRequest.description: Represents a user's request to delete their account or a specific pitch.

definition.description: Contains all investment pitches posted by startups.
Tracks investor interest in specific pitches.
Manages introduction requests between investors and startups.
